name: Sarah M.
text: Matt and his team completely transformed our garage floor. The metallic epoxy finish looks like something out of a showroom. Professional, on time, and the price was very fair. Highly recommend!

name: James R.
text: We had our pool deck recoated and it looks brand new. The slip-resistant finish gives us peace of mind with the kids running around. Matt was great to work with from start to finish.

name: Linda & Tom K.
text: After getting 4 quotes, we went with MGP Coatings and couldn't be happier. Our patio went from cracked and stained to absolutely gorgeous in one day. Matt's 30 years of experience really shows.
